title: Application of this Code
full_text:
1.1.1.1 Application of this Code
Application of this Code
1) Except as provided in Sentence (3), this Code applies to the design and
construction of all new buildings described in Sentence 1.3.3.2.(1) of Division A of the
NBC and to additions. (See Note A-1.1.1.1.(1).)
2) This Code applies to subsequent alterations to and within buildings originally
constructed in accordance with this Code. (See Note A-1.1.1.1.(2).)
3) This Code does not apply to farm buildings.

sentences.text: Except as provided in Sentence (3), this Code applies to the design and construction of all new buildings described in Sentence 1.3.3.2.(1) of Division A of the NBC and to additions. (See Note A-1.1.1.1.(1).)
This Code applies to subsequent alterations to and within buildings originally constructed in accordance with this Code. (See Note A-1.1.1.1.(2).)
This Code does not apply to farm buildings.
